title: Farmer's Delight: Extended
description: Adds a variety of new food recipes that seamlessly fills the gap between Create and Farmer's Delight—no new crops or mobs required.
body:
Farmer’s Delight: Extended is a lightweight recipe expansion mod designed to seamlessly integrate with Farmer’s Delight and the Create mod. This add-on introduces a variety of delicious new meals and desserts using only existing items—no new crops, mobs, or resources required. Whether you're automating meals with Create or cooking by hand in your cozy farmhouse kitchen, this mod adds flavor without bloating your game. Each new recipe is crafted with a focus on balance, immersion, and fun—ideal for both survival progression and aesthetic kitchen builds.

Currently, the mod adds several new recipes including: Fish and Chips, Fried Chicken and Fries, Chocolate and Honey Rolls, Chicken Parmesan, Cheeseburgers, Ice Cream Sandwiches, Mochi, Brownies, Golden Apple Cider, and more.

Future updates will introduce a growing selection of treats and drinks, including coffee, s'mores, decorative and edible cakes, and expanded use of chocolate, including dark and white varieties.

Whether you're a farmer, chef, or engineer, Farmer’s Delight: Extended is the only Farmer's Delight and Create add-on that you'll ever need.
